lines.text: Hohoho, as the saying goes, nobody knows you better than yourself!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Oh, I get it now... He's saying there's one more thing he has to take care of...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Sure, you got a little nudge from your "other self," but at the end of the day, he's still built on "you," right? Haha!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: But you know... it feels a tad strange, doesn't it? A robot that looks just like a real person.
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
